# Controlled Table Patterns

::: {.table type="comparison" density="compact" width="0.96" caption="Model capability comparison" label="tab:model-comparison" header="true" striped="true"}
| Model | Best use | Limitation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Small | Fast checks | Shallow context |
| Medium | Daily drafting | Needs review |
| Large | Architecture reasoning | Higher cost |
:::

::: {.table type="checklist" density="compact" width="0.86" caption="Release checklist" label="tab:release-checklist" header="true" striped="false"}
| Item | Owner | Done |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Red tests recorded | Test worker | Yes |
| PDF evidence captured | Test worker | No |
| Fallback documented | Implement worker | No |
:::

::: {.table type="rubric" density="normal" width="0.9" caption="Rubric-like grading table" label="tab:rubric-like" header="true" striped="true"}
| Level | Evidence | Score |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Excellent | Cross-page PDF passes | 5 |
| Acceptable | Controlled TeX renders | 3 |
| Missing | Only string checks exist | 1 |
:::

::: {.table type="cheatsheet" density="compact" width="0.78" caption="Shortcut cheat sheet" label="tab:shortcut-cheatsheet" header="true" striped="true"}
| Shortcut | Meaning | When to use |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ctrl+K | Command palette | 快速跳转 |
| gh issue view | Inspect handoff | 调试交接 |
| 长表格 | Cross-page evidence | PDF 验收 |
:::
